        children: "_meta"
      }), " field"]
    }), "\n", _jsxs(_components.p, {
      children: ["In the past, RxDB used a hacky way to mark documents as being from the remote instance during replication.\nThis is needed to ensure that pulled documents are not sent to the backend again.\nRxDB crafted a specific revision string and stored the data with that string.\nThis meant that it was not possible to replicate with multiple endpoints at the same time.\nFrom now on, all document data is stored with an ", _jsx(_components.code, {
        children: "_meta"
      }), " field that can contain various flags and other values.\nThis makes it easier for plugins to remember stuff that belongs to the document."]
    }), "\n", _jsxs(_components.p, {

        children: "In the future"

        children: "_deleted"
      }), " and ", _jsx(_components.code, {
        children: "_attachments"
      }), " will be moved from the root level\nto the ", _jsx(_components.code, {
        children: "_meta"
      }), " field. This is ", _jsx(_components.strong, {
        children: "not"
      }), " done in release ", _jsx(_components.code, {
        children: "12.0.0"
      }), " to ensure that there is a migration path."]
    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.h2, {
      id: "removed-rxstorage-rxkeyobjectinstance",
      children: "Removed RxStorage RxKeyObjectInstance"
    }), "\n", _jsxs(_components.p, {
      children: ["In the past, we stored local documents and internal data in a ", _jsx(_components.code, {

        children: "RxStorage"
      }), " interface.\nIn PouchDB, this has a ", _jsx(_components.a, {

        children: "slight performance"
      }), " improvement compared to storing that data in 'normal' documents because it does not have to handle the revision tree.\nBut this improved performance is only possible because normal document handling on PouchDB is so slow.\nFor every other RxStorage implementation, it does not really matter if documents are stored in a query-able way or not. Therefore, the whole ", _jsx(_components.code, {
        children: "RxStorageKeyObjectInstance"
      }), " is removed. Instead, RxDB now stores local documents and internal data in normal storage instances. This removes complexity and makes things easier in the future. For example, we could now migrate local documents or query them in plugins."]
    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.h2, {
